title: Cross-chain Merkle root sync via EIP-1186 storage proofs with Base/Arbitrum/Polygon adapters

artifacts.description: Abstract base contract: 30-slot ring buffer for root history, replay protection via (chainId, blockNumber) bitmap, submitRoot() entry point, getRootAt() lookup, and emits RootRelayed events
Arbitrum-specific adapter: validates L2-to-L1 message via ArbSys inbox proof, decodes humanTree/agentTree slot values from EIP-1186 accountProof+storageProof, calls CrossChainRootRelay.submitRoot()
Polygon-specific adapter: validates inclusion against CheckpointManager stateRoot, decodes EIP-1186 storage proof for humanTree/agentTree slots, calls CrossChainRootRelay.submitRoot()
Read-only mirror deployed on Arbitrum and Polygon: exposes latestHumanRoot(), latestAgentRoot(), and isRootValid(root, maxAge) by querying the chain-local CrossChainRootRelay ring buffer
Pure library: RLP-decodes EIP-1186 account proof and storage proof, verifies Merkle-Patricia trie inclusion against a given stateRoot, returns decoded slot value

SDK helper wrapping eth_getProof: takes provider, registryAddress, blockTag; returns typed StorageProof object with accountProof, storageProofs for humanTree (slot 0) and agentTree (slot 1), plus RLP-encoded calldata ready for submitRoot()
High-level relay helper: calls generateStorageProof(), selects correct adapter address by chainId, estimates gas, submits transaction, awaits RootRelayed confirmation
Hardhat unit tests: ring buffer wrap-around at slot 30, replay rejection on duplicate (chainId, blockNumber), getRootAt() boundary conditions, owner-gated submitRoot() access control
Unit tests for StorageProofVerifier library using pre-generated EIP-1186 fixtures: valid proof acceptance, tampered value rejection, wrong root rejection
Hardhat fork test against Arbitrum Sepolia: snapshots a real block, calls eth_getProof on Base Sepolia registry, verifies adapter accepts proof and mirror reflects updated roots
Hardhat fork test against Polygon Amoy: mirrors same flow for CheckpointManager-based proof validation
SDK unit tests with mocked eth_getProof responses: correct slot selection, RLP encoding round-trip, error on missing block, error on unrecognized chainId

Operator runbook: relay bot setup (cron vs event-driven), required RPC endpoints per chain, gas budget guidelines, monitoring alerts for stale root age, emergency pause procedure, and ring buffer capacity planning

Protocol spec: storage slot layout for IdentityRegistry (humanTree=slot0, agentTree=slot1), security model (trusted L1 finality vs optimistic window), ring buffer eviction policy, replay protection scheme, and trust assumptions per chain bridge

steps: Audit IdentityRegistry.sol storage layout: confirm humanTree root is slot 0, agentTree root is slot 1; document in spec/cross-chain-root-sync.md
Implement StorageProofVerifier.sol library: RLP decode EIP-1186 accountProof and storageProof arrays, verify Merkle-Patricia trie path against stateRoot, return uint256 slot value

Implement CrossChainRootRelay.sol: 30-element ring buffer (writeIndex pointer, mapping index→RootEntry{humanRoot,agentRoot,srcBlock,timestamp}), replay bitmap keyed on keccak(srcChainId,srcBlockNumber), onlyRelayer modifier, submitRoot() and getRootAt()

Implement IdentityRegistryMirror.sol: stores address of local CrossChainRootRelay, exposes latestHumanRoot() returning ring buffer head, isRootValid(root, maxAge) scanning backward through buffer within age window

Implement ArbitrumRootAdapter.sol: inherit CrossChainRootRelay, constructor takes L2 ArbSys inbox address, submitFromArbitrum() accepts RLP-encoded EIP-1186 proof + L2 block header, calls StorageProofVerifier, then submitRoot()

Implement PolygonRootAdapter.sol: inherit CrossChainRootRelay, constructor takes CheckpointManager address, submitFromPolygon() accepts checkpoint data + EIP-1186 storage proof, verifies stateRoot via CheckpointManager.headerBlocks(), then submitRoot()

Write Hardhat deploy scripts: deploy StorageProofVerifier lib, ArbitrumRootAdapter on Arbitrum Sepolia, PolygonRootAdapter on Polygon Amoy, IdentityRegistryMirror on each pointing to its local adapter

Implement SDK generateStorageProof.ts: wrap eth_getProof with slot list [0,1], parse response into typed StorageProof, RLP-encode accountProof+storageProofs into ABI-compatible bytes for adapter submitRoot() calldata
Implement SDK relayRoot.ts: orchestrate generateStorageProof() → adapter.submitRoot() flow with chainId dispatch table, gas estimation, receipt polling, and typed RootRelayed event return
Write unit tests for CrossChainRootRelay (ring buffer, replay protection) and StorageProofVerifier (fixture-based EIP-1186 proof acceptance/rejection)
Write Hardhat fork integration tests for Arbitrum and Polygon adapters using real eth_getProof snapshots from testnets
Write SDK unit tests for generateStorageProof with mocked provider responses and RLP round-trip assertions
Write operator runbook: relay bot cron setup, per-chain RPC config, gas budget, stale-root alerting, emergency pause flow
Update bolyra/CLAUDE.md crosschain section and add crosschain deploy commands to package.json
dependencies: EIP-1186 eth_getProof RPC (Base, Arbitrum, Polygon nodes)
Polygon CheckpointManager contract on Ethereum mainnet/Goerli
Hardhat multichain deploy plugin (hardhat-deploy or ignition)
Existing IdentityRegistry.sol deployed on Base Sepolia
L1 finality assumptions: Arbitrum ~7-day challenge window (use fast finality for testnet), Polygon checkpoint interval ~30 min
